channel.title: Debug on Dodoslav - eBlog
channel.description: Recent content in Debug on Dodoslav - eBlog

item.title: IBM Datastage - debug mód
item.description: http://www-01.ibm.com/support/docview.wss?uid=swg21509567 Service management File: /opt/IBM/InformationServer/IIS115/Server/DSODB/bin/DSAppWatcher.sh Variable: APW_DEBUG Populating DSODB File: /opt/IBM/InformationServer/IIS115/Server/DSODB/DSODBConfig.cfg Variable: TraceMax=1000 File: /opt/IBM/InformationServer/IIS115/Server/DSODB/DSODBTuning.cfg Variable: com.ibm.datastage.jlog.DSFileHandler.level=DEBUG
